title: Back-End Software Development Intern · Quintessential SFT
description: Responsible for developing and implementing new features for a Backend as a Service (BaaS) platform, streamlining the development of self-hosted web applications. Utilized technologies such as gRPC, GraphQL, WebSockets, Prometheus and Grafana. Engineered solutions for data migration and extension of the PostgreSQL and MongoDB databases for the platform.

title: Java Software Engineer · Agile Actors
description: Part of a Scrum team responsible for the development of the core back-office insurance systems at Interamerican. Actively contributed to the entire development lifecycle, including Sprint planning, testing, deployment, and maintenance. Prototyped an instrumentation module for the platform, aimed at gaining performance insights and accelerating production incidents resolution.
